manifest.name: AI Annotate

name: AI Annotate

releases.author: SDS-Mode
releases.description:
## AI Annotate v0.2.0

Initial public release.

### Features
- Inline `%%ai` markers and selection-based annotations
- Claude CLI integration with streaming JSON protocol
- Word-level inline diff with accept/reject controls
- Batch processing of multiple annotations
- Accept all / Reject all commands
- Configurable CLI path, timeout, model, and system prompt
- Context strategy setting (full document, section only, section ± neighbors)
- Advanced CLI options: extra arguments and environment variables
